meta.title: Francesco De Patre // TERMINAL
meta.description: Francesco De Patre – Computer, Electronic & Communication Engineer

identity.team: Former Head of Software at UNIPR Racing Team
identity.focus: Embedded systems · Data fusion · Deep learning

about: Francesco De Patre is an engineering student and former member of the UNIPR Racing Team, working on projects related to Formula SAE. He specialises in embedded systems, robotics, and multimodal data fusion, with hands-on experience in STM32 development, CAN bus communication, and deep learning for sensor-based applications. His projects include Kinect-based perception and real-time data processing.

experience.desc: Overseeing development & integration of software systems for the Formula SAE car. Embedded systems design, CAN bus communication, real-time monitoring tools.
Programming, CAN bus implementation, electronic systems design. Hardware/software integration across disciplines.

education.desc: AI, cybersecurity, embedded systems, machine learning, real-time operating systems, high-performance computing.
Java, internet technologies, signal processing, communication networks, electronics.

education.role: High School Diploma — Corporate Information Systems
education.desc: Computer science, programming, information systems, economics and business operations.

projects.title: Face Detector
projects.desc: 3D perception using Kinect depth + RGB. Real-time multimodal data fusion with GPS and compass for spatial mapping.

projects.title: Winery App
projects.desc: Java client/server platform for wine trading. Connects producers, distributors, consumers with secure data communication.

projects.title: BikeHeaven
projects.desc: React e-commerce for bicycles. Auth, shopping cart, payment gateway. Fully responsive and performant.

projects.title: WeatherMeasurements
projects.desc: Java app collecting meteorological data (temp, humidity, wind, pressure) via client/server. Historical trend visualisation.

projects.title: ArtGallery
projects.desc: Online platform to showcase and sell artworks. Minimalist layout, image galleries, artist profiles, contact integration.

projects.title: KinectDetection
projects.desc: Face detection integrating Kinect RGB + depth. ResNet18 feature extraction combined with GPS/orientation for distance estimation.

contact.subtext: Whether you have a question or want to chat about embedded systems, robotics, or creative tech — open a channel.
